meta_title: For Freelancers: SEO for SaaS to Solve can't scale projects (Intermediate Case Study)
meta_description: Learn how to SEO for SaaS and overcome can't scale projects. A Intermediate-level Case Study using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: SEO for SaaS to Solve Scaling Issues
content.seo_description: Learn how to SEO for SaaS and overcome scaling bottlenecks. A developer-focused case study using Antigravity and Claude Code to automate growth.
content.answer_block: Stop manually managing SEO and start building programmatic infrastructure. By integrating Antigravity for automated content generation and Claude Code for iterative site optimization, you can transform static SaaS landing pages into high-traffic engines. This approach reduces manual labor by 80%, allowing you to scale client projects rapidly.
content.intro:
You are staring at a dashboard that refuses to grow. You have built the perfect SaaS feature, but the traffic remains a flatline. The problem isn't your code; it is your invisibility. As a freelancer, you cannot afford to spend hours on manual SEO audits while your next client project sits in the queue.

The shift happens when you stop treating SEO as a marketing chore and start treating it as a deployment pipeline. By leveraging AI-agent workflows, you can turn your SaaS codebase into a self-optimizing engine. This is how you reclaim your time and deliver measurable growth for your clients without burning out.

steps.title: Automated Keyword Gap Analysis
steps.description: Identify high-intent search terms by analyzing your competitors' existing site structure using automated scraping agents.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the provided competitor URL list and extract the top 20 high-intent search keywords and their corresponding content gaps.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --task 'scrape competitors and output keyword list to keywords.json'

steps.title: Programmatic Content Generation
steps.description: Use Antigravity to generate localized, high-value landing page content at scale based on the keywords identified.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate 10 variations of landing page copy focused on 'SaaS automation' using the identified keywords, ensuring a 2.5% keyword density.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --task 'generate landing page content for each keyword in keywords.json'

steps.title: Dynamic Metadata Injection
steps.description: Ensure every generated page has unique, optimized meta tags to maximize Click-Through Rate (CTR) from search engines.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a script to dynamically inject unique meta titles and descriptions into the Next.js header component based on SEO best practices.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --task 'apply metadata injection script to src/components/SEO.tsx'

steps.title: Internal Linking Automation
steps.description: Build an automated internal linking structure to pass authority between your new landing pages and the core SaaS app.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a function that scans generated pages and automatically inserts internal links to related service pages.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --task 'implement internal linking logic in lib/seo-utils.ts'

steps.title: Deployment and Performance Audit
steps.description: Verify that your new SEO-optimized pages meet Core Web Vitals standards before pushing to production.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Run a performance audit on the generated routes and suggest code-splitting improvements for faster load times.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --task 'audit Lighthouse scores and optimize bundle size for new pages'

pro_tips: Never target high-volume head terms; use long-tail 'problem-solution' queries to capture high-intent users.
Use Claude Code to create custom ESLint rules that enforce SEO metadata requirements on every new page file.
Implement an automated sitemap generator that triggers every time your AI agent pushes new content to the repo.
Serve your SEO content via Edge functions to ensure latency remains under 50ms, boosting Google rankings.
Always include a CTA block within the generated content body, not just the footer, to maximize conversion.
content.next_steps: Deploy your new SEO-optimized pages to Vercel, monitor the Google Search Console index coverage, and refine your keywords based on the first 30 days of impressions.
content.conversion_block: Stop scaling manually and start building systems that grow while you sleep. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
